current_checkpoint.name: L0 — The Feel
current_checkpoint.goal: Surfable fluid sim + ASCII visual identity + live tuning. Does it feel good to just fly around?

current_section.title: Monday night shift — parallel physics prototypes + ASCII + dev panel + test harness
current_section.test_owner: corb (runs project-local Puppeteer tests after build)
acceptance_criteria: At least one prototype (N1a) running with fluid sim, ship, wells, waves at 60fps
ASCII post-process shader rendering the fluid as colored characters
Ship renders on Layer 1 above ASCII substrate (Layer 0)
Dev panel with live sliders for all CONFIG tunables
Smoke + physics tests passing via node tests/run-all.js
Greg can open the prototype, play, and tune via dev panel Tuesday morning
current_section.last_result: Orchestration bootstrap complete. All design docs, roadmap, agent prompts, context dumps, and orchestration loop finalized. Ready for first real build dispatch.
current_section.next_action: Orb pulls N1a into planning, routes through Orrery for spec confirmation, then dispatches Corb. Parallel: N1b if a second Corb is available.

roadmap.priority_order: N1a > N2 > N3 > N0 > N1b (Forge Review #2)
roadmap.execution_rule: Parallelize exploration, serialize adoption. One mainline, probes promote or get backlogged.

sections.title: Approach A — single fluid sim + oscillating force injection
sections.deliverables: Fluid sim, ship, wells, waves, Tier 1 affordances, CONFIG, __TEST_API, layered rendering
sections.notes: Mainline. First task to pull. See AGENT-PROMPTS.md Prompt A.

sections.title: Approach B — dual solver probe
sections.deliverables: Same interface as N1a but with wave equation solver coupled to Navier-Stokes
sections.notes: Probe only. Parallel if second Corb available. Backlog if not clearly better by Tuesday AM.

sections.title: Dev panel — minimal Monday version
sections.deliverables: Floating slider panel, copy config, reset. No presets/localStorage Monday.
sections.notes: Non-negotiable. Greg must have sliders before Tuesday morning review.

sections.title: ASCII dithering post-process shader + layered rendering pipeline
sections.deliverables: Font atlas, ASCII shader, 4-layer rendering (substrate/entity/VFX/HUD), color mapping
sections.notes: Art Is Product (Pillar 1). Portable between both prototypes.

sections.title: Smoke + physics test harness
sections.deliverables: Puppeteer smoke.js + physics.js + run-all.js. 6 checks max Monday.
sections.notes: Any future Corb runs this to self-verify. Thin Monday, grows with the game.

sections.title: Wrecks + loot pickup
sections.deliverables: Wreck entities, fly-over loot, wreck-as-fluid-obstacle, inventory

sections.title: Portals + extraction
sections.deliverables: Portal entities, evaporation, extraction, run end states, restart loop

sections.title: Black hole growth + universe clock
sections.deliverables: Well mass growth, viscosity ramp, wave amplitude scaling, 10-min run target
sections.notes: Tuesday night. Can parallel with N4/N5.

sections.title: Signal system
sections.deliverables: Signal tracking, emission rates, decay, tier display, visual feedback
sections.notes: Wednesday night. Signal is tax, not currency.

sections.title: The Inhibitor
sections.deliverables: Threshold trigger, spawn, hunt AI, UI corruption, instant death, stealth counter
sections.notes: Wednesday night. The one threat that matters.

sections.title: NERV/EVA HUD
sections.deliverables: DOM overlay, corner panels, center warnings, CRT effects, Inhibitor corruption

sections.title: Visual juice pass
sections.deliverables: Ship trail, entity halos, screen shake, portal death animation, well visual

sections.title: Audio foundation
sections.deliverables: Web Audio drone, well harmonics, wave rhythm, signal choir, Inhibitor tone, event sounds
sections.notes: Thursday night. Reads game state, doesn't modify it. Fully independent lane.

sections.title: Between-run progression
sections.deliverables: Metagame screen, Exotic Matter currency, 4-5 ship upgrades, localStorage persistence

sections.title: Procedural universe identity
sections.deliverables: Per-run cosmic signature, wreck civilization names, wreck visual variety, randomized layout

sections.title: Balance pass
sections.deliverables: All constants in CONFIG, 8-12 min run target tuned, timeline verified

sections.title: Title + flow screens
sections.deliverables: Title screen, game over (collapse + Inhibitor), extraction success, smooth transitions

sections.title: Performance optimization
sections.deliverables: Profile, frustum rendering, memory leak check, Firefox test

sections.title: Edge cases + bug fixes
sections.deliverables: Resize, tab switch, localStorage errors, mobile message, no console errors

sections.title: Final fixes (from Greg's Saturday notes)
sections.deliverables: Whatever Greg flagged Saturday evening

sections.title: Stretch goals
sections.deliverables: Signal Moths, Force Pulse, Difficulty Scaling, Dynamic Audio Mixing (priority order)

sections.title: Player primer / How to Play doc
sections.deliverables: How-to-play for itch.io page and potential in-game overlay

orb.role: state keeper, roadmap puller, orchestrator, journal backstop
orb.commits: PROJECT-STATE.json, PROJECT-BOARD.md, DEVLOG.md, CHANGELOG.md (batched), night reports, Forge reviews

orrery.commits: DECISION-LOG.md, design doc updates from planning

forge.commits: nothing directly — output goes to Orb

corb.role: transient implementation worker, spawned on demand by Orb
corb.commits: code, design doc updates from implementation, CHANGELOG entries with doc changes

default_loop: Orb pulls the next roadmap item
Orrery shapes the bounded task (if planning needed)
Forge reviews the plan (if architecture review needed)
Orrery revises if Forge pushes back
Orb dispatches Corb with approved task packet
Orb routes fixes (to Corb for bugs, to Orrery for architectural issues) or marks ready_for_greg
Orb commits journal updates (devlog, changelog, night report)
workflow.board_policy: No silent skips. If state changes, Orb updates both PROJECT-STATE.json and PROJECT-BOARD.md and commits them.

history.event: Context imported from orb-assistant thread and last-black-hole jam docs reviewed.
Workshop orchestration loop spec created; project state bootstrapped.
Actor wiring verified: Orb active, Forge/Orrery verified as standalone bots, Corb available as transient worker.
Promoted LBH into orchestrator/project-tracker mode with kanban flow.

Orchestration bootstrap approved by Claude review. All design docs finalized. Monday night task list cleaned for Orb ingestion. Journal/commit responsibilities enumerated per actor. Ready for first build dispatch.
